description: Ground truth for VulnerableBank — deliberately vulnerable contract with 4 known issues.

vulnerabilities.description: State variable balances[msg.sender] is modified after an external call to msg.sender. An attacker can reenter withdraw() before the balance is decremented.
The return value of to.send(amount) is not checked. If the send fails, the function continues silently.
selfdestruct can be called by any address. Missing access control check allows anyone to destroy the contract.
Uses tx.origin for authentication instead of msg.sender. A phishing contract can exploit this to steal ownership.
